documentation.description:
As a special exception under Section 7 of GPL version 3, you are granted
additional permissions described in the GCC Runtime Library Exception,
version 3.1, as published by the Free Software Foundation.

simple_types.name: Constant_Reference_Type
simple_types.code:
type Constant_Reference_Type (Element : not null access constant Element_Type) is private with
  Implicit_Dereference => Element;

simple_types.name: Variable_Reference_Type
simple_types.code:
type Variable_Reference_Type (Element : not null access Element_Type) is private with
  Implicit_Dereference => Element;

subprograms.name: Constant_Ref
subprograms.code: function Constant_Ref (Container : aliased in Vector; Index : in Index_Type) return Constant_Reference_Type

subprograms.name: Variable_Ref
subprograms.code: function Variable_Ref (Container : aliased in out Vector; Index : in Index_Type) return Variable_Reference_Type
